title: Office
description: A physical office location of the Manhattan District Attorney's Office — the Main Office at One Hogan Place plus community offices in Harlem and Washington Heights. Reverse-engineered from manhattanda.org/contact-us; no structured data source exists, so this is a design-first schema over published addresses and phone numbers.

name.description: Office name (e.g. 'Main Office', 'Harlem Office', 'Washington Heights Office').
